newsArray.title: When will Matheesha Pathirana join KKR squad for IPL 2026? Head coach Abhishek Nayar confirms
newsArray.description: Matheesha Pathirana is set to miss the opening matches of IPL 2026, with Kolkata Knight Riders head coach Abhishek Nayar confirming the update during a press conference. He revealed that the franchise has been in touch with Sri Lanka Cricket, who indicated that the 23-year-old pacer is expected to regain full fitness by mid-April and will join the KKR squad thereafter.
